nasb.text: Then I annihilated the three shepherds in one month, for my soul was impatient with them, and their soul also was weary of me.

esv.text: In one month I destroyed the three shepherds. But I became impatient with them, and they also detested me.

cnv.text: 在一個月之內我除滅了三個牧人。我的心厭煩他們，他們的心也討厭我。

ccb.text: 我在一个月之内除掉了三个牧人。 然而，我厌烦羊群，他们也厌恶我。
